reviews.author: Andrew G.
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of working with Rohan as I also had the displeasure of my heating system conking out while I was out of town. Came home and it was 60 degrees in the house.

reviews.author: Cassandra R.
reviews.text: It's a very good feeling to find someone you can trust when it comes to HVAC/plumbing, and you get both here! We initially reached out because of the great Yelp reviews.

reviews.author: Nish K.
reviews.text: Rohan was a life saver. Our HVAC stopped cooling one fine day making our upstairs very hot (perfect timing).

reviews.author: Tracy B.
reviews.text: Thank you Rohan! Absolute life saver. After seeing so many glowing reviews (whenever you see 4.9 stars and over 50 reviews you know someone is doing something right) I immediately reached out.

reviews.author: S. N.
reviews.text: Rohan tells it like it is and does excellent work without any surprises.

reviews.author: R. B.
reviews.text: Came out on Saturday night of holiday weekend when our AC went out and system replaced on Sunday.

reviews.author: Sheila U.
reviews.text: Rohan is prompt, offers fair pricing, and explains everything he is doing. He doesn't make you buy something unless you really need it.

reviews.author: Jennings H.
reviews.text: They reply quickly to inquiries, provide an honest assessment. Their work is quality and affordable.

reviews.author: Renee N.
reviews.text: HVAC Guyz ATL is extremely professional. Fair pricing and excellent customer service!

reviews.author: Freeway C.
reviews.text: Quick and easy! Called these guys and they figured out the problem while still on the phone.

notes: Strong review data. Yelp 5.0/63, Birdeye 4.8/41. Most reviews mention Rohan personally. Dual HVAC+plumbing is a notable differentiator in Atlanta. 'Honest, doesn't upsell' is the consistent theme across all sources. Did NOT publish the unverified 2005/NY founding claim per research caution.
